objective: Encourage light interaction after the March 30 feed post
visual_intent: portrait-led first frame with white-card follow-through
brand_guardrails: keep it lighter than the feed carousel
protect top and bottom Story-safe zones
keep all three frames in one calm system
avoid English-facing internal labels on the visible asset
keep the CTA frame interactive rather than salesy
composition: frame 1 may use a calm trust portrait as a soft image plate
frames 2 and 3 should simplify toward white-card Story clarity
leave a clear lower-third zone for the poll sticker on frame 3
keep Japanese copy short and authored by line
reference_strategy: Use the trust portrait anchors for the opening frame mood and the approved education white-card example for spacing restraint and Story-safe text hierarchy.
variation_guardrails: do not duplicate the exact March 30 feed layout
keep the Story lighter and faster than the feed
change crop, exact copy rhythm, and support cue if the story is refreshed later
for any future source-image refresh, generate the portrait or support plate only rather than the full text-led frame

text_overlay.headline_ja: ブランドを 信頼する時、 何を見ますか？
slides_ja: ブランドを 信頼する時、 何を見ますか？
見た目だけでなく 成分や姿勢も 判断軸に。
あなたが最初に 見る点は？

negative_prompts: English template labels in the visible artwork
poll area blocked by decorative elements
notes: March 30 Story companion. This asset is best handled as a design-first Story. If a stock-style portrait or environment plate is needed later, the prompt engineer should create a dedicated Nano Banana source-image prompt and keep the layout itself in the compositor.
